description_long: This object is a spherical structure with a dark, glossy surface that features a vibrant magenta and purple nebula-like pattern, interspersed with a grid of faint lines and small, star-like dots. The coloration is most intense on one hemisphere, gradually fading to a darker, almost black shade on the opposite side. The surface appears smooth and slightly reflective, with the grid pattern suggesting a digital or high-tech aesthetic. There are no visible seams, openings, or mechanical features such as screens, card slots, or keypads. The overall appearance is futuristic and abstract, lacking any clear interface or branding. Its form and finish evoke a sense of advanced technology, but it does not display any recognizable ATM components.
description: A glossy, spherical object with a magenta nebula pattern and faint grid lines, fading to black on one side. No visible ATM features or interfaces.
description_view_0: The sphere displays a dense magenta nebula pattern with a visible grid and scattered star-like dots.
description_view_1: This view shows a more prominent grid overlay and a brighter magenta coloration, with the nebula effect more pronounced.
description_view_2: The magenta nebula is still visible but less intense, with the grid pattern covering most of the surface.
description_view_3: The surface is mostly dark, with only faint hints of the magenta nebula and grid pattern visible.
attribute_screen_interface: None visible; the surface is continuous and unbroken, with no apparent screen or UI elements.
